items.title: 5 Notre Dame Football Photos For A Friday: Meaningless Bowl Love
items.summary: When Notre Dame decided to end the 2025 college football season by opting out of playing in a bowl game, people all over the country kind of lost their minds. items.title: Will Notre Dame have another top 5 football recruiting class this cycle?
items.summary: The 2026 football recruiting cycle was a breakthrough class for Marcus Freeman and the Notre Dame Fighting Irish. After years of front running in the spring, only to fall behind near signing day, the Irish were able to sign a top 5 class with multiple 5-Star players. It was, without question, the best recruiting class […]

items.title: Just another time Notre Dame smacked around USC on the football field
items.summary: On a chilly, rain-soaked October afternoon in 1995, when the skies over South Bend mirrored the intensity of one of college football’s greatest rivalries, Notre Dame Fighting Irish football welcomed the fifth-ranked USC Trojans football to town. The Trojans arrived with the spotlight, the swagger, and the expectations—but Notre Dame had something else in mind. […]

items.title: What spring storylines for Notre Dame Football will be overrated in the fall?
